behavior.description: `[behavior."<bundle-id>"]` per-app overrides — set only the keys to override: roles / min-size / auto-click-on-unique / appear-effect / match-effect / unmatch-effect / narrow-effect. Missing keys inherit the global [behavior] / [overlay.effect] value.

auto-click-on-unique.description: Auto-click when one candidate remains after partial input.

min-size.description: Min frame size (pt, either axis) for an element to be labeled. Clamped >= 0. 0 disables.

roles.description: AX roles to label (no `AX` prefix). Empty entries dropped.

web.description: Role allow-list used inside an AXWebArea subtree; falls back to [behavior].roles.

roles.description: Web-context AX roles to label; unset inherits [behavior].roles.

leader.description: Chord leader (first char only after trim+lowercase). Empty (default) disables chord mode.

exclude.description: Bundle IDs perch never activates over.

grid.description: Single-pass + recursive grid density + nested-grid threshold.

nest-min-size.description: `,g` chord falls back to AXPress below this frame floor (pt). Clamped 1..1000.

active.description: Global hotkey that activates hint mode. Modifiers shift|ctrl|alt|cmd joined with `+`, then a key (e.g. "shift+space", "ctrl+alt+j").

cancel.description: Key that dismisses an active overlay (single key, no modifiers). Unknown names fall back to esc.

alphabet.description: Characters used to label elements, in priority order. De-duplicated, non-letters dropped, lowercased; empty after cleaning = default.

prioritise-center.description: Assign the easiest keys to elements closest to screen center when elements outnumber first-tier letters.

overlay.description: Pill rendering knobs (theme + shape + font + a few overlay behaviour flags).

accent.description: Accent override layered over the theme. "system" (default) keeps the theme accent; a sill colour token (named / #rgb / #rrggbb / #rrggbbaa) overrides it. Unrecognised falls back to "system".

anim-enabled.description: Global motion kill-switch — false collapses every effect to its instant baseline.

blur-enabled.description: Frosted-glass NSVisualEffectView under the pills; false = solid dark fill.

color-cycle-ms.description: Hue rotation period (integer ms). Clamped 0..120000 (0 locks the color); out-of-range falls back to 3000ms.

effect.description: Border preset: off / neon / cyber / vapor / kawaii / rainbow / random.

glow.description: NSShadow bloom under the stroke (the neon-tube feel).

width.description: Border line width (pt). Clamped 0.5..30; out-of-range falls back to 1.5.

effect.description: Hint-flow animations (appear / match / unmatch / narrow) plus shared knobs.

appear.description: Entrance animation as the overlay appears: off / pop / cascade / fade-in / drop-in / bloom / random.

duration-scale.description: Multiplier on every animation duration. Clamped 0.1..5.0; out-of-range falls back to 1.0.

intensity.description: Spatial magnitude scaler: subtle / normal / bold / wild (does not lengthen duration).

match.description: Animation on the winning pill at resolve. Unknown clamps to "off".

narrow.description: Per-pill exit animation when a typed prefix filters a pill out. fireworks/confetti downgrade to fade at runtime.

unmatch.description: Animation layered on the 200ms red flash for a missed key. Unknown clamps to "off".

peek-key.description: Hold-to-peek key (trimmed + lowercased). Empty disables; unknown names disable silently.

pill-shape.description: Pill geometry: pill / square / circle / underline / tag. Unknown clamps to "pill".

shortcut-badge.description: Show AX-bound keyboard-shortcut annotations on --menu pills.

show-modifier-badge.description: Modifier-badge corner annotation: off / glyph / action. Legacy bools true/false map to glyph/off.

sound.description: Audio feedback. match / unmatch / activate take a macOS system-sound name OR a file path (tilde-expanded); empty silences.

match.description: Sound on hint resolve (system-sound name or path).

theme.description: Pill color/typography theme. A sill catalog name (terminal / dracula / github-dark / … / system / random) OR a [overlay.themes.<name>] custom palette name. Unknown clamps to "system".

themes.description: `[overlay.themes.<name>]` user-defined palettes — set `[overlay].theme = "<name>"` to select one. Keys: pill-bg / accent / text / miss (colour tokens), pill-bg-alpha (0..1), font (mono / rounded / system / menu). Names shadowing a built-in are ignored.

regional.description: Frame floor for regional-mode container labeling.

min-height.description: Min container height (pt) to label. Clamped >= 0.

min-width.description: Min container width (pt) to label. Clamped >= 0.

synonyms.description: `[search.synonyms]` fuzzy-match expansion table for --search / --menu / --windows / --emoji. Each key maps to a string array of synonyms (bidirectional; the key itself and empties are dropped).
